_meta.purpose: Page template for an operational dashboard: which content blocks are allowed and how to order them. Compose by SELECTING blocks per content (see sections.json → whenToUse), not by copying example.json. example.json is only a density/style reference.

overview.note: If the content includes headline KPIs/metrics, lead with a single metric row (3 read-only cards).

detail.note: One or more detail blocks chosen by content: entities/projects/reports → content-grid; tabular records with columns → data-table.

rules: Header is always the first child (app name; meta-nav off; no 'Startseite' item).
Prefer ONE Section wrapping the dashboard (metric row → Divider → detail block), matching the reference example. Use separate titled Sections only for genuinely distinct content groups.
Every Section spacing 'small' for a dense, scannable B2B layout.
Backgrounds: first section color.background.canvas; if multiple sections, alternate surface/canvas.
NEVER emit empty placeholders (Select 'Input Text', ✕ icon buttons, glyphless icons). Only add a Select/Icon/Button once its label/value/glyph/action is provided (see blocks.json → noPlaceholders).
Read-only metrics have no action; entity cards use a single Link; tables are read-only unless a real row action is defined.
